headline: ICE рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҙ POPS Nurse Alex рҹҚ‘рҹ©ә in Minneapolis ICE RAGE-FEST рҹ”ҘрҹҳЎ
text:
Minneapolis FREEZING вқ„пёҸрҹҳ° streets ERUPTING рҹ”ҘрҹҡЁ after ICE FEDS рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ•¶пёҸ SMOKED рҹ’ҘрҹҚҶ 37yo ICU NURSE DADDY Alex Pretti рҹ©әрҹ’Ә вҖ“ second US CITIZEN рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҰ… DROPPED DEAD рҹҳөрҹ’Җ in under a MONTH during TRUMP'S рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ MASS DEPORT SIMP RAID рҹӣёрҹҡ”! Hundreds BRRRR рҹҘ¶рҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ protesting CHANTING рҹ‘Ҹрҹ“Ј 'Justice for Alex' while lighting CANDLES рҹ•ҜпёҸрҹҳў at the BLOODY SPOT рҹ©ёрҹ“Қ вҖ“ but FEDS claim he was DOMESTIC TERROR SIMP рҹӨЎрҹ”« 'perpetuating VIOLENCE' per Kristi Noem рҹ’…рҹҮәрҹҮё, saying he RUSHED with 9MM DICK-GUN рҹҚҶрҹ”«!

VIDEOS рҹ“№рҹ”Ҙ spilling TEA вҳ•: Alex FILMING рҹ‘Җрҹ“ұ ICE GOONS like a BOSS, agent SHOVES lady рҹ’ғрҹӨ•, Nurse Hero STEPS UP рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ PEPPER SPRAY рҹҢ¶пёҸрҹҳ« to the FACE, wrestled DOWN рҹҳ©рҹ”’ by MASKED THUGS рҹҳ·рҹ‘№, NO GUN рҹҡ«рҹ”« in sight but GREY JACKET FED рҹ§Ҙ yanks PISTOL from WAISTBAND рҹҚ‘рҹ’Ҙ then BAM рҹ’Ј TEN SHOTS рҹ”«рҹ”«рҹ”«рҹ’Ё! Eyewitnesses & FAM рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ SCREAM 'SICKENING LIES рҹӨҘрҹӨ®' вҖ“ BBC Verify рҹҚөрҹ”Қ says PHONE not WEAPON рҹ“ұвқҢ, DHS coping 'SELF-DEFENSE HEROES рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҡ”пёҸ' but Walz рҹҳӨрҹ—ЈпёҸ calls BS: 'SEVEN GUYS vs ONE NURSE? рҹҳӮрҹӨЎ PURE NONSENSE!'

TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹҗҳ accuses DEMS of 'INCITING INSURRECTION' рҹӨ¬рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ like Jan6 REMIX, but Gov Walz & Mayor Frey рҹҡ«рҹҡ” BEG 'GTFO ICE AGENTS рҹҘҫрҹҡӘ вҖ“ how many MORE AMERICANS gotta EAT BULLETS рҹ’ҘрҹҚ” before this DEPORT ORGY ENDS?!' Even GOP Sen Bill Cassidy рҹҳұрҹ“ұ says 'DISTURBING AF рҹҳ°, FULL PROBE NEEDED рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”Қ or ICE CRED GOES POOF рҹ’Ёрҹҡ«!' Chief O'Hara рҹҸ«рҹ‘® confirms Alex LEGAL GUN BRO рҹ”«вң… NO CRIM RECORD except TICKETS рҹҡҰрҹҳҸ вҖ“ MN PERMIT SLAYS рҹҚҶрҹ“ң!

Protests SPREADING рҹҢҺрҹ”Ҙ to NYC рҹ—Ҫ 'ABOLISH ICE' signs вңҠрҹҡ«, CHI рҹҢӯ, LA рҹҢҙ, SF рҹҢү вҖ“ all cuz TRUMP'S DEC DEPORT BOMB рҹ’Јрҹӣ©пёҸ after SOMALI FRAUD BROS рҹ•Ңрҹ’ё got BUSTED! First victim Renee Good рҹ’”рҹ‘© earlier this MOON рҹҢҷ, now Nurse King GONE рҹҳўрҹ‘‘ вҖ“ tensions BOILING вҳ•рҹ”Ҙ between STATE SIMPS & FEDERAL RAID MACHINES рҹӨ–рҹҡ”. Deputy Blanche on NBC рҹӨ–рҹ“ә: 'VIDS UNCLEAR рҹ‘Җвқ“, INVESTIGATE BRRR!' Walz PLEADS 'KEEP PEACEFUL вңҢпёҸ' but streets RAGING рҹҳЎрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ ICE got that POWER ARREST рҹҡ”рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ but NURSE with PHONE рҹ“ұ got BODIED рҹ’Җ?! Minneapolis MELTDOWN рҹҚҰрҹ”Ҙ, Trump Deport DADDY рҹ‘‘рҹҚҶ vs Nurse HERO рҹ©әрҹҰё вҖ“ WHO YA GOT BETCHA?! рҹҺ°рҹҳӨ
